title: eugenia guayaquilensis
intro: Eugenia guayaquilensis, also known as Guayabilla or Pimenta, is a plant species that belongs to the family Myrtaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anthraquinone and phenolic content. The health benefits of Eugenia guayaquilensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Eugenia guayaquilensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or infusion, and is commonly used in traditional medicine in South America.
